description: You are the Director of Product Strategy at NovaTrade Commerce. Create an Oracle Analytics workbook named 'sku_performance' using the dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx. The workbook must contain exactly three canvases: 'Category Scorecard' (analyzing total Sales and Profit by Product Category and Ship Mode), 'Margin Leaders' (analyzing Product Category performance using a calculated column 'Gross_Margin_Pct' with formula (Sales - Shipping Cost) / Sales * 100), and 'Container Performance' (analyzing total Sales and Shipping Cost by Product Container using a calculated column 'Margin_After_Ship' with formula Sales - Shipping Cost). Save the workbook to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\sku_performance.dva.
